header.subtitle: Learn about the rewards you can earn by referring friends.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.defaultSummary: Invite your friends to join us! When they sign up and make their first qualifying action (like a purchase or subscription), you both get rewarded. It's a win-win!

tiers.name: Standard Cash Reward
tiers.description: For each friend who signs up for a paid plan and remains a customer for 30 days.
conditions: Referred friend must be a new customer.
Referred friend must subscribe to any paid plan.
Referred friend must complete their first billing cycle (if applicable).
Referral link must be used for signup.

tiers.name: Enterprise Client Bonus
tiers.description: If your referred friend signs up for an Enterprise level plan.
tiers.rewardForReferee: 10% off first year of Enterprise plan
conditions: Referred friend must sign an annual Enterprise contract.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Criteria
notes: This program is open to all registered users.
Rewards are subject to verification and may be adjusted or revoked if fraudulent activity is detected.
The terms of this program may be updated at any time.

claiming.title: Claiming Your Rewards
claiming.defaultInfo: Referrer rewards (account credits) are typically applied to your account within 7-10 business days after your referred friend meets all eligibility criteria. Referee discounts are applied automatically at their first checkout when using the referral link.

items.question: How many friends can I refer?
items.answer: There's no limit! The more friends you successfully refer, the more rewards you can earn.

items.question: When will I see my reward credit?
items.answer: Usually within 7-10 business days after your friend meets the conditions, like completing their first billing cycle.

items.question: Can I refer someone who has used our service before?
items.answer: No, the referral program is designed for new customers only.

items.question: What happens if my friend forgets to use my link?
items.answer: Unfortunately, the referral must be tracked through your unique link to qualify for rewards.
